name: Very Low
descr: Minimal scour potential. Stable channel conditions. Rock or competent material at foundation. No specific scour action required.

name: Low
descr: Some scour potential but foundation well above estimated scour depth. Minor channel mobility. Include scour check in routine inspections.

name: Medium
descr: Moderate scour risk. Foundation close to estimated scour depth. Active channel erosion. Dedicated scour survey required every 3 years.

name: High
descr: High scour risk. Foundation at or near estimated critical scour depth. Significant channel mobility. Annual scour depth measurement and countermeasures required.

name: Very High
descr: Critical scour risk. Foundation may be exposed or at failure scour depth. Active undermining possible. Quarterly monitoring and emergency countermeasures required.
